customAttributes.description: Whenever a creature you control that's enchanted or equipped attacks, that creature gains double strike until end of turn.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: His impromptu demonstration of the portable energy shield attachment both saved lives and increased demand for aether-powered multi-tool gauntlets tenfold.
